arabic:
وعن ابن عباس رضي الله عنهما أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏لا يخلون أحدكم بامرأة إلا مع ذي محرم‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Ibn Abbas (May Allah be pleased with them) said:
english.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "No one of you should meet a woman in privacy unless she is accompanied by a Mahram (i.e., a relative within the prohibited degrees).".

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
